name: Campfire Cake in a Orange Shell
recipeIngredient: 1 Box Jiffy yellow cake mix, (8 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice 2 inches in diameter from the oranges and save the slices.
2. Remove the orange from its shell carefully to avoid damaging it.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to the package instructions.
4. Fill each half of the orange shells about halfway with the cake mix.
5. Replace the top of the orange shells and wrap tightly in foil.
6. Bake in hot coals or on a grill for about 20 minutes, turning occasionally.
This recipe is perfect as a breakfast treat when camping. Enjoy eating the oranges out of their shells with a spoon first, then once the cakes are done baking, you may eat them using a spoon or peel the orange and enjoy a warm orange cake.
